---
title: "About the author"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Course template note
This repository is a forkable, open-source course. If you are adapting it for your institution or your own learning context, fork the repo and replace the placeholders below with your own info.

You can take the course fully self-paced with no instructor. See [How to use this course](course-how-to-use.qmd). The fields below are for credit and contact, not for live support.
:::

## Author

*Course author info goes here.* Role, affiliation, short bio, research interests, and how to get in touch.

## Contributors

*If you adapted, extended, or contributed to this course, list yourself here.* This is a living document. See the [course repository](https://github.com/mdmanurung/ai-fluency-for-bio) for the change history.

## Citation

If you use this course's material in your own teaching or work, please cite the GitHub repository ([github.com/mdmanurung/ai-fluency-for-bio](https://github.com/mdmanurung/ai-fluency-for-bio)) and credit the original author.

The course is licensed under [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/). Adapt freely with attribution.
